subcodes.first_line: Let them strive with utmost endeavor to preserve the Divine Book, for it hath again been recited before His Countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در حفظ کتاب الهی سعی بلیغ مبذول دارند چه که مجدد امام وجه قرائت شده
subcodes.subjects: @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings
